set.body: Four-phase overhaul of tools/ benchmark infrastructure, driven by the bench-audit report in .omc/research/bench-audit/. The regression gate is currently a no-op (silent perf regressions pass CI), 23 of 26 benchmark scripts are orphaned, statistical analysis throws away 6 of 7 samples per cell, and the cold/warm delta is computed but never consumed. This epic groups all follow-on work. Phases: P0 unbreak the gate, P1 statistical soundness, P2 coverage and orphans, P3 reporting. See .omc/research/bench-audit/{runnability,harness-coverage,analytics-completeness,bugs}.md for source findings.
set.title: EPIC: Benchmark harness overhaul <e2><80><94> fix gate, reclaim signal, close coverage
